signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Defenders with this ability do not need to spend stamina on shed attempts during a run play
Defenders with this ability can still tackle effectively while trying to strip the football.
Defenders with this ability will ignore one bar of blocker resistance when attempting swim/club pass rush moves
Defenders with this ability are granted a free pass rush move once per play after spending stamina to perform one
Defenders with this ability have an increased success rate when using conservative or diving tackles.
Defenders with this ability will frequently prevent additional yardage gains while tackling
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes 10-20 yards from the LoS, inside the numbers
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes 10-20 yards from the LoS, outside the numbers
After securing a RAC catch, ballcarriers with this ability can quickly shift momentum, change direction, and turn the corner without sacrificing speed.
Players with this ability will recover from the effects of Wear and Tear and fatigue at an increased rate between plays.
Defenders with this ability can still tackle effectively while trying to strip the football.
Ballcarriers with this ability are effective at recovering from attempted tackles regardless of their current stamina.
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes 10-20 yards from the LoS, inside the numbers
After securing a RAC catch, ballcarriers with this ability can quickly shift momentum, change direction, and turn the corner without sacrificing speed.
Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win impact blocks against linebackers and defensive backs when playing as a lineman or fullback.
Blockers with this ability gain blocker resistance points as a faster rate
Vanguard players are the reason running backs thank their blockers in the postgame interview. When they enter the zone, they are nearly guaranteed dominant impact block wins.
Ballcarriers with this ability retain more of their forward momentum during tackles while travelling at high speeds.
Ballcarriers with this ability will frequently attempt to gain extra yards while being tackled
Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win impact blocks against linebackers and defensive backs when playing as a lineman or fullback.
The game's top defenders excel in all situations. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their chance of defeating run blocks, and disrupting catches via tackles.
Defenders with this ability are rarely faked out by ballcarrier moves (and cannot be faked out when user-controlled).
